mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ai_conversation (user_id, session_id, model_name, business_type, knowledge_base_name, user_question, ai_response, created, modified) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{modelName}, #{businessType}, #{knowledgeBaseName}, #{userQuestion}, #{aiResponse}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ai_conversation SET user_id = #{userId}, model_name = #{modelName}, business_type = #{businessType}, knowledge_base_name = #{knowledgeBaseName}, user_question = #{userQuestion}, ai_response = #{aiResponse}, modified = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
